name: Casa de la Moneda - Envios de Dinero y Cambio de Cheques
description_short: Casa de la Moneda offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment, and phone recharges at their Phoenix location. Spanish-language financial services for the local community.
description_long:
Casa de la Moneda is a financial services storefront located in Phoenix, Arizona at 1610 N. 36th St., B102. The business operates as a check-cashing and money services center serving the Spanish-speaking community in the greater Phoenix area. The company maintains a Facebook presence with 143 followers and uses social media for business updates and employment postings.

The company offers a range of basic financial services including check cashing (cambio de cheques), money orders, domestic and international money transfers (envíos de dinero), bill payment services (pago de bills), phone recharges (recargas telefónicas), and money box transfers (envíos de caja). These services are typical of community-based check-cashing and remittance centers that serve customers who may prefer Spanish-language services or lack traditional banking relationships.

Casa de la Moneda distinguishes itself primarily through culturally-targeted service delivery, with all marketing conducted in Spanish and staff recruitment appearing to prioritize bilingual capabilities. The business has been active since at least 2022 based on Facebook posting history. The company actively recruits part-time staff, suggesting ongoing operations and potential growth.

The business currently has no customer reviews or ratings available on its Facebook page. As a small, independent check-cashing operation with limited online presence beyond Facebook, consumers should note the lack of third-party verification or customer feedback. The company provides basic contact information (email and physical address) but does not display standard business hours on their public Facebook profile, which states the location is "currently closed" at the time of data collection. Pricing, fee structures, and service terms are not disclosed online.
pros: Offers money transfers (envíos de dinero) for international remittances, common service need in Phoenix Latino community
Provides multiple payment services including bill payment (pago de bills) in one location
Bilingual Spanish-language services with staff experienced in check cashing and money services
Operates physical storefront location in Phoenix for in-person service
Offers phone recharge services (recargas telefónicas) alongside financial services
Money order services available for secure payment delivery
cons: No customer reviews or ratings available on public platforms to assess service quality or reliability
Facebook page shows status as 'currently closed' with no standard business hours displayed
Limited online presence and no official website beyond Facebook reduces transparency
No pricing, fee, or service term information disclosed online for comparison
No third-party verification of licensing, registration, or compliance with financial regulations
best_for: Spanish-speaking customers in Phoenix seeking check cashing and money transfer services
Individuals needing to send international remittances to Latin America
Customers preferring in-person service at community-based financial centers over banks
diagnosis: Casa de la Moneda is best for Spanish-speaking Phoenix residents who need check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment services at a community-based location. The primary caveat is the lack of online transparency regarding operating hours, fees, and service terms, combined with zero customer reviews, making it difficult to assess reliability or compare costs before visiting in person.
services: Domestic and international money transfers (envíos de dinero)
